title: WP9 Progress, Results and Next Steps
author: Hayashi, Erika
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This presentation was given at the OCEAN:ICE Annual Meeting on October 25th, 2023 during the OCEAN:ICE Work Pacakges Progress, Results and Plans for the next 12 months session. Erika Hayashi (DMI) presented WP9 Dissemination and Outreach and the Equity, Diversity and Inclusivity Policy. Chiara Bearzotti (DMI) presented WP9 Project Management, Reporting. The OCEAN:ICE Annual Meeting was part of a Joint Project meeting together with the EU Horizon 2020 project, SO-CHIC which took place at Sorbonne University in Paris from October 23rd to 26th, 2023. The Joint Project meeting included SO-CHIC's Annual Project Meeting, a Joint SO-CHIC and OCEAN:ICE Conference, and the OCEAN:ICE Annual Meeting.
